mnemonics.title: Stack Operations
mnemonics.content: PUSH: Place Up Stack Head, POP: Pull Off Peak

mnemonics.title: Queue Operations
mnemonics.content: ENQUEUE: Enter Next Queue Unit, DEQUEUE: Depart Existing Queue Unit

mnemonics.title: Implementation Difference
mnemonics.content: Stack: Single Pointer (Top), Queue: Two Pointers (Front & Rear)
